note: Testing depth describes how far a run goes. It does not rank the value of the idea or guarantee the strength of the result.

levels.label: Light Test
levels.purpose: A clean first pass for overlap, clarity, and obvious failure points.
levels.claim_ceiling: First-pass finding only. No validation claim.

levels.label: Medium Test
levels.purpose: A structured run with sources, controls, cross-checks, and reusable data.
levels.claim_ceiling: Governed test result under recorded conditions. Confirmation requires stronger design or replication.

levels.label: Heavy Test
levels.purpose: A full research lane for preregistration, data lock, stress tests, and reproducibility.
minimums: code and data release when permitted
levels.claim_ceiling: Deepest interpretation supported by the preregistered design, evidence, controls, and replication state.
